# Calcnate
> Free, law-accurate end-of-service & gratuity calculators. A Servia Group (servia.ae) project, built in the UAE.

## Calculators
- [Gratuity Calculator UAE](https://calcnate.com/uae/gratuity-calculator/): UAE: 21 days basic salary/year first 5 years, 30 days/year after, ÷30 daily, cap 2 years' wages, min 1 year, resignation no longer reduces it (Decree-Law 33/2021).
- [UAE Unemployment Insurance (ILOE) Calculator](https://calcnate.com/uae/unemployment-insurance-calculator/): UAE ILOE (unemployment insurance, Decree-Law 13/2022): 60% of avg basic salary (last 6mo), Category A (basic ≤16,000) capped AED 10,000/mo, Category B (basic >16,000) capped AED 20,000/mo, up to 3 months/claim, 12-month lifetime aggregate cap, needs 12 consecutive months' subscription, involuntary job loss only (not resignation/misconduct).
- [UAE Final Settlement Calculator](https://calcnate.com/uae/final-settlement-calculator/): 
- [Saudi End of Service Calculator](https://calcnate.com/saudi/end-of-service-calculator/): Saudi (ESB): ½ month/year first 5, 1 month/year after, on last wage incl. allowances; resignation reduced (0 under 2yr, ⅓ 2-5yr, ⅔ 5-10yr, full 10yr+).
- [Qatar Gratuity Calculator](https://calcnate.com/qatar/end-of-service-calculator/): Qatar: ≥21 days (3 weeks) basic wage per completed year, min 1 year, no resignation reduction.
- [Kuwait Indemnity Calculator](https://calcnate.com/kuwait/indemnity-calculator/): Kuwait indemnity: 15 days/year first 5, 1 month/year after, daily=monthly÷26, on full pay; cap 18 months; resignation reduced.
- [Bahrain Leaving Indemnity Calculator](https://calcnate.com/bahrain/leaving-indemnity-calculator/): Bahrain: ½ month/year first 3 years, 1 month/year after, pro-rated from day one, on last wage.
- [Oman Gratuity Calculator](https://calcnate.com/oman/gratuity-calculator/): Oman (RD 53/2023): 1 month basic/year for service from Aug 2023; earlier service 15 days/yr first 3 then 1 month/yr; min 1 year.
- [India Gratuity Calculator](https://calcnate.com/india/gratuity-calculator/): India (Payment of Gratuity Act): (last basic+DA × 15 × years) ÷ 26, after 5 years, >6 months rounds up, cap ₹20 lakh.
- [Philippines Separation Pay Calculator](https://calcnate.com/philippines/separation-pay-calculator/): Philippines: separation pay 1 month/year (redundancy) or ½ month/year (retrenchment/closure/disease), min 1 month; retirement 22.5 days/year (60-65, 5yr+); resignation none.
- [Bahrain Probation Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/bahrain/probation-period-calculator/): Bahrain probation (Labour Law 36/2012 Art.21): max 3 months (6 by Ministerial decision), either party ends with 1 day notice, once per employer.
- [Bahrain Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/bahrain/maternity-leave-calculator/): Bahrain maternity (Art.32): 60 days full pay, +15 days optional unpaid, no cap on occurrences, employer-paid.
- [Oman Probation Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/oman/probation-period-calculator/): Oman probation (RD 53/2023 Art.37): max 3 months (monthly-paid) / 2 months (other), either party ends with 7 days notice, once per employer.
- [Oman Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/oman/maternity-leave-calculator/): Oman maternity (RD 53/2023 Art.84): 98 days full pay (up from 50), no cap on occurrences, no minimum service (both removed by new law).
- [India Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/india/maternity-leave-calculator/): India maternity (Maternity Benefit Act 1961 as amended 2017, Sec.5): 26 weeks (182 days) full pay for 1st/2nd child, 12 weeks (84 days) from 3rd; needs 80 days worked in prior 12mo; establishments with 10+ employees.
- [Philippines Probationary Employment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/philippines/probation-period-calculator/): Philippines probation (Labor Code Art.296): max 6 months; ends for just-cause or failure-to-meet-standards (no separation pay), or authorized-cause (separation pay owed, standard formula).
- [Philippines Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/philippines/maternity-leave-calculator/): Philippines maternity (RA 11210): 105 days paid every pregnancy (no cap by child count), +15 days for solo parents (120 total), SSS-funded, needs 3 monthly SSS contributions in prior 12mo.
- [UAE Probation Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/uae/probation-period-calculator/): UAE probation (Decree-Law 33/2021 Art.9): max 6 months, employer ends=14 days notice, employee resigns to new UAE employer=30 days, employee resigns to leave=14 days; no gratuity under 1yr service.
- [UAE Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/uae/maternity-leave-calculator/): UAE maternity (Art.30): 60 days total = 45 days full pay + 15 days half pay, no minimum service required, employer-paid.
- [Saudi Probation Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/saudi/probation-period-calculator/): Saudi probation (Art.53, amended RD M/44 eff.~Feb2025): max 180 days (contract-set), mutual termination rights, NO statutory notice period (contract governs), no gratuity owed.
- [Saudi Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/saudi/maternity-leave-calculator/): Saudi maternity (Art.151, amended RD M/44 eff.~Feb2025): 12 weeks (84 days) full pay, 6 weeks mandatory post-delivery, no minimum service (tenure tiers removed 2025).
- [Qatar Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/qatar/maternity-leave-calculator/): Qatar maternity (Labour Law 14/2004 Art.96, private sector): 50 days full pay, requires 1+ year continuous service, min 35 days post-delivery.
- [Kuwait Probation Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/kuwait/probation-period-calculator/): Kuwait probation (Labour Law 6/2010 Art.32): max 100 working days, either party ends without notice or indemnity, only wages for days worked owed.
- [Kuwait Maternity Leave Calculator](https://calcnate.com/kuwait/maternity-leave-calculator/): Kuwait maternity (Art.24): 70 days full pay, daily=monthly÷26, plus up to 4 months further unpaid childcare leave on request.

- [UAE Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/uae/notice-period-calculator/): UAE notice: standard 30-90 days (contractual, Art.43) either party; probation (Art.44) employer-ends=14d, employee-resigns-to-UAE-employer=30d, employee-resigns-leaving=14d.
- [Saudi Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/saudi/notice-period-calculator/): Saudi notice (Art.75, amended eff. 18-Feb-2025): employee resigns=30d flat; employer ends=60d(monthly-paid)/30d(other).
- [Qatar Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/qatar/notice-period-calculator/): Qatar notice (Art.49, monthly/annually-paid): <=5yr service=1 month, >5yr=2 months, either party.
- [Kuwait Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/kuwait/notice-period-calculator/): Kuwait notice (indefinite contract): 3 months if monthly-paid, 1 month otherwise, either party, waivable via payment in lieu.
- [Bahrain Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/bahrain/notice-period-calculator/): Bahrain notice (Art.99(a)): flat 30 days either party, no sliding scale by service; pay-in-lieu on basic wage + social allowance (Art.47).
- [Oman Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/oman/notice-period-calculator/): Oman notice (RD 53/2023 Art.38, unlimited contracts only): 30d monthly-paid / 15d other; pay-in-lieu on comprehensive/gross wage.
- [Philippines Notice Period Calculator](https://calcnate.com/philippines/notice-period-calculator/): Philippines notice: 3 regimes -- authorized-cause (redundancy/retrenchment/closure)=30d advance notice to employee+DOLE (Art.298, mandatory not payable-in-lieu); just-cause=no fixed notice, twin-notice due process instead (Art.297); resignation=30d, employer-waivable (Art.300). India notice period SKIPPED -- too fragmented across state Shops & Establishments Acts to state a single formula.
- [UAE Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/uae/leave-encashment-calculator/): UAE leave encashment: 30 days/yr after 1yr (2 days/month for 6mo-1yr); encashed at BASIC salary ÷30 × unused days (Art.29 + Cabinet Resolution 1/2022 Art.19) -- different from in-service leave pay, which uses full wage.
- [Saudi Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/saudi/leave-encashment-calculator/): Saudi leave encashment: 21 days/yr (<5yr), 30 days/yr (5yr+); cannot be cashed out during employment (Art.109), mandatory at end of service (Art.111), on last wage (basic+regular allowances) ÷30.
- [Qatar Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/qatar/leave-encashment-calculator/): Qatar leave encashment: 21 days/yr (<5yr), 28 days/yr (5yr+) on basic wage (Art.79), ÷30 daily rate.
- [Kuwait Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/kuwait/leave-encashment-calculator/): Kuwait leave encashment: 30 days/yr after 1yr; daily wage = monthly ÷26 (not 30), matching the indemnity divisor.
- [Bahrain Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/bahrain/leave-encashment-calculator/): Bahrain leave encashment: 30 days/yr (2.5/month) on GROSS salary (basic+fixed allowances) ÷30 (Art.58) -- different wage basis from Bahrain's notice pay-in-lieu.
- [Oman Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/oman/leave-encashment-calculator/): Oman leave encashment: 30 days/yr; in-service cash-out is basic wage only (employer-optional, needs written consent); mandatory end-of-service encashment uses the comprehensive/gross wage.
- [India Leave Encashment Calculator](https://calcnate.com/india/leave-encashment-calculator/): India leave encashment: (Basic+DA) ÷30 × unused earned-leave days (some employers use ÷26); tax-exempt up to ₹25 lakh lifetime for non-government employees (Sec.10(10AA)); annual entitlement RATE varies by state/sector so this tool encashes a user-supplied day balance rather than computing accrual.
- [Philippines Leave Encashment Calculator (Service Incentive Leave)](https://calcnate.com/philippines/leave-encashment-calculator/): Philippines leave encashment: Service Incentive Leave (SIL), 5 days/yr after 1yr (Art.95), the only Labor Code leave type mandated commutable to cash; daily rate × unused SIL days.
## Blog
- [Qatar Gratuity 2026: The Complete End-of-Service Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-gratuity-guide/): The 3-week rule, wage basis, resignation and a worked QAR example.
- [How to Calculate Your Qatar Gratuity: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-gratuity-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method with three worked QAR examples and a payout table.
- [5 Mistakes People Make Calculating Qatar Gratuity](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-gratuity-mistakes/): Gross-vs-basic, wrong divisor, the 1-year rule and more.
- [Qatar Notice Period 2026: The Complete Guide to Article 49](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-notice-period-guide/): Article 49: the 1-month vs 2-month rule and payment in lieu.
- [How to Calculate Qatar Notice Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-notice-period-calculation-example/): How to work out notice pay in lieu, with worked QAR examples.
- [Qatar Notice Period: FAQ, Scenarios & Common Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-notice-period-faq/): Resigning, termination, pay in lieu and fixed-term scenarios.
- [Qatar Leave Encashment 2026: The 21 vs 28 Day Rule](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-leave-encashment-guide/): Article 79: the 21 vs 28 day rule and how unused leave is paid.
- [How to Calculate Qatar Leave Encashment: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-leave-encashment-calculation-example/): Turn unused annual leave into a QAR figure, step by step.
- [Qatar Leave Encashment: FAQ & Common Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-leave-encashment-faq/): Resignation, the 21/28-day rate, carry-over and common mistakes.
- [Qatar Maternity Leave 2026: The 50-Day Rule Explained](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-maternity-leave-guide/): The 50-day rule and the 1-year eligibility test explained.
- [How to Calculate Qatar Maternity Leave Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-maternity-leave-calculation-example/): Calculate your 50-day maternity pay, with an eligibility check.
- [Qatar Maternity Leave: FAQ, Scenarios & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-maternity-leave-faq/): Eligibility, job protection and private vs public sector.
- [Kuwait End-of-Service Indemnity 2026: The Complete Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-indemnity-guide/): Two-band rate, the ÷26 divisor, resignation cuts and the 18-month cap.
- [How to Calculate Kuwait Indemnity: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-indemnity-calculation-example/): Work out indemnity by hand for termination and resignation.
- [5 Mistakes People Make Calculating Kuwait Indemnity](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-indemnity-mistakes/): The ÷26 divisor, full-vs-basic pay and resignation reductions.
- [Kuwait Notice Period 2026: 3 Months vs 1 Month Explained](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-notice-period-guide/): 3 months vs 1 month, payment in lieu and fixed-term contracts.
- [How to Calculate Kuwait Notice Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-notice-period-calculation-example/): Calculate notice pay for monthly and daily-paid workers.
- [Kuwait Notice Period: FAQ, Scenarios & Common Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-notice-period-faq/): Resigning, termination, probation and fixed-term scenarios.
- [Kuwait Probation Period 2026: 100 Days, No Notice](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-probation-guide/): Article 32: the 100-day cap and no notice required, either way.
- [How to Calculate Kuwait Probation Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-probation-calculation-example/): What you are owed if a job ends during probation, worked out.
- [Kuwait Probation Period: FAQ, Scenarios & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-probation-faq/): The 100-day cap, no-notice exit and life after probation.
- [Kuwait Maternity Leave 2026: 70 Days Full Pay](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-maternity-leave-guide/): 70 days full pay, unpaid childcare leave and nursing breaks.
- [How to Calculate Kuwait Maternity Leave Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-maternity-leave-calculation-example/): Calculate your 70-day maternity pay on the ÷26 basis.
- [Kuwait Maternity Leave: FAQ, Scenarios & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-maternity-leave-faq/): The 70-day rule, unpaid extension and job protection.
- [UAE Notice Period Explained: Article 43, Probation Notice & Pay in Lieu](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-notice-period-explained/): The 30-90 day rule, the 14 vs 30 day probation notice, and pay in lieu on gross wage.
- [GCC Notice Period Comparison: UAE vs Saudi vs Qatar vs Kuwait vs Bahrain vs Oman](https://calcnate.com/blog/gcc-notice-period-comparison/): Every Gulf notice period side by side, with the wage basis for pay in lieu.
- [UAE Leave Encashment Guide: How Unused Annual Leave Is Paid Out](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-leave-encashment-guide/): The basic-salary ÷30 formula, the 30-day entitlement and a worked example.
- [Annual Leave Encashment Across the GCC & Asia Compared](https://calcnate.com/blog/gcc-annual-leave-encashment-compared/): Entitlement, wage basis and the ÷30 vs ÷26 divisor across eight countries.
- [UAE Unemployment Insurance (ILOE) Guide: 60% of Basic, Category A/B Caps & How to Claim](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-unemployment-insurance-iloe-guide/): How much ILOE pays, the caps, eligibility and the 30-day claim window.
- [UAE Probation Period Rules: The 6-Month Cap, Notice & What You're Owed](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-probation-period-rules/): The 6-month limit, probation notice, and why there's no gratuity.
- [Probation Periods Compared: UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman & Philippines](https://calcnate.com/blog/gcc-probation-periods-compared/): Max length, notice to end, and any pay owed across six countries.
- [UAE Maternity Leave Entitlement: 60 Days, Full & Half Pay Explained](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-maternity-leave-entitlement/): 45 days full pay + 15 half pay, no minimum service, and what it's worth.
- [Maternity Leave Compared Across 8 Countries](https://calcnate.com/blog/gcc-maternity-leave-compared/): Duration, pay level, minimum service and who funds it, side by side.
- [UAE Full and Final Settlement Checklist: Everything You're Owed When You Leave](https://calcnate.com/blog/full-and-final-settlement-uae-checklist/): Gratuity, leave encashment, notice, dues and ILOE — each with its calculator.

## Guides & articles (blog)
- [UAE Gratuity After Resignation: Do You Still Get Paid in 2026?](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-gratuity-after-resignation/): Why resignation and termination now pay the same — and the old 1/3, 2/3 tiers explained.
- [Saudi End-of-Service Benefit 2026: The Complete ESB Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-end-of-service-2026-guide/): The half-month/full-month bands, resignation reductions and worked examples.
- [Qatar End-of-Service Gratuity for Expats: The 3-Week Rule](https://calcnate.com/blog/qatar-gratuity-expat-guide/): The flat 21-days-per-year minimum, the basic-wage basis, and a worked example.
- [Kuwait End-of-Service Indemnity Explained: Bands, ÷26 & the 18-Month Cap](https://calcnate.com/blog/kuwait-indemnity-explained/): The 15-day/1-month bands, the ÷26 daily wage, resignation tiers and the 18-month cap.
- [Oman Gratuity & the New Law 53/2023: What Changed](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-gratuity-new-law-2023/): How Royal Decree 53/2023 split old and new service — and raised the rate.
- [Bahrain Leaving Indemnity: How End-of-Service Is Calculated](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-leaving-indemnity-guide/): The half-month/full-month bands, day-one accrual and who it covers.
- [India Gratuity Eligibility: The 5-Year Rule, 15/26 Formula & ₹20 Lakh Cap](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-gratuity-eligibility-5-years/): Who qualifies, the 15/26 formula, part-year rounding and the tax-free cap.
- [Philippines Separation Pay Guide: How Much You're Owed by Cause](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-separation-pay-guide/): Authorized-cause one-month vs half-month rates, resignation, and retirement pay.
- [How to Calculate Gratuity in the UAE: A Step-by-Step Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-gratuity-uae-step-by-step/): Four simple steps and a fully worked example — then run it in the calculator.
- [Gratuity: Basic Salary vs Total Salary — The Costly Mistake](https://calcnate.com/blog/gratuity-basic-salary-vs-total-salary/): Which GCC countries use basic, which use full wage, and why it changes your number.
## Blog: UAE & Saudi employment-benefit guides
- [UAE Gratuity: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-gratuity-complete-guide/): Everything you need to know about UAE end-of-service gratuity under Federal Decree-Law 33/2021 — who qualifies, how it is worked out, and the traps that shrink your payout.
- [How to Calculate UAE Gratuity (Worked Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-uae-gratuity/): A step-by-step method for working out your UAE end-of-service gratuity by hand — plus a ready-reckoner table you can check your own numbers against.
- [UAE Notice Period: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-notice-period-complete-guide/): How much notice you or your employer must give in the UAE, what the law fixes versus what your contract sets, and what you are owed while working it out.
- [How to Calculate UAE Notice Pay (Worked Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-uae-notice-period/): When notice is not served, one side pays the other for the missing days.
- [UAE Notice Period: FAQs & Common Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-notice-period-faq-mistakes/): The notice-period questions UAE employees ask most, and the misunderstandings that lead to disputes at the end of a job.
- [UAE Leave Encashment: Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-leave-encashment-complete-guide/): How unused annual leave is turned into cash when you leave a UAE job — the entitlement, the basic-salary rule that surprises everyone, and carry-over limits.
- [How to Calculate UAE Leave Encashment](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-uae-leave-encashment/): Turn your unused annual-leave days into a cash figure in three steps, with a worked example and a lookup table.
- [UAE Leave Encashment: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-leave-encashment-faq-mistakes/): The leave-encashment errors that cost UAE employees money — and straight answers to the questions HR gets asked most.
- [UAE Probation Period: Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-probation-period-complete-guide/): Everything the UAE labour law fixes about probation — the six-month ceiling, who can end it and how, and what you are (and are not) owed.
- [UAE Probation Rules Explained (Article 9)](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-probation-period-rules-explained/): A scenario-by-scenario walk-through of what actually happens if a UAE job ends during probation — with the notice figures and the money.
- [UAE Probation Period: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-probation-period-faq-mistakes/): The probation misunderstandings that lead to unexpected bills at the end of a trial period — and clear answers to the questions we hear most.
- [UAE Maternity Leave: Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-maternity-leave-complete-guide/): Your full maternity entitlement in the UAE private sector — the 45+15 day structure, who pays, the extras for a sick newborn, and nursing breaks on return.
- [How to Calculate UAE Maternity Pay](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-uae-maternity-leave-pay/): Work out exactly what you will be paid across the 45 full-pay and 15 half-pay days of UAE maternity leave, with a worked example.
- [UAE Maternity Leave: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-maternity-leave-faq-mistakes/): The maternity-leave questions UAE mothers ask most, and the misconceptions that cause under-payment or missed entitlements.
- [UAE Unemployment Insurance (ILOE): 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-iloe-complete-guide/): How the UAE's mandatory unemployment insurance (ILOE) works — the tiny premium, the 60% payout, the caps, who is eligible, and how a claim is paid.
- [How to Calculate Your UAE ILOE Payout](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-uae-iloe-claim/): Work out what ILOE would actually pay you if you lost your job — the 60% rule, the category cap, and the three-month maximum, with numbers.
- [UAE ILOE Insurance: FAQs & Common Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/uae-iloe-faq-mistakes/): The unemployment-insurance mistakes that get UAE claims rejected — and clear answers to the questions subscribers ask most.
- [Saudi End-of-Service Award: 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-end-of-service-complete-guide/): How the Saudi end-of-service benefit (ESB) is built under the Labor Law — the half-month and full-month bands, the last-wage basis, and how resignation changes the figure.
- [How to Calculate Saudi End-of-Service Pay](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-saudi-end-of-service/): Work out your Saudi ESB by hand in four steps, including how the resignation tiers cut the figure — with a full worked example.
- [Saudi End-of-Service: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-end-of-service-faq-mistakes/): The end-of-service errors that shrink Saudi payouts — and straight answers to the questions employees ask most.
- [Saudi Notice Period: 2026 Guide (Article 75)](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-notice-period-complete-guide/): How much notice applies in Saudi Arabia after the 2025 Labor Law amendment — the new 30-day employee rule, the employer's 60 days, and what happens if notice is skipped.
- [How to Calculate Saudi Notice Pay](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-saudi-notice-period/): When Saudi notice is not served, one side pays the other for the missing days.
- [Saudi Notice Period: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-notice-period-faq-mistakes/): The notice-period misunderstandings that cause Saudi exit disputes since the 2025 amendment — cleared up.
- [Saudi Probation Period: 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-probation-period-complete-guide/): What the Saudi Labor Law fixes about probation since the 2025 amendment — the 180-day ceiling, who can end it, and why your contract sets the notice.
- [Saudi Probation Rules Explained (2025 Change)](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-probation-period-rules-explained/): A plain-language walk-through of how Saudi probation actually works after the 2025 Labor Law change — and why your contract, not the law, sets the notice.
- [Saudi Probation Period: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-probation-period-faq-mistakes/): The probation misconceptions that catch Saudi employees out since the 2025 Labor Law change — and the correct positions.
- [Saudi Maternity Leave: 2026 Guide (Article 151)](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-maternity-leave-complete-guide/): The Saudi maternity entitlement after the 2025 Labor Law change — 12 weeks at full pay, who pays, and the extra leave for a newborn who needs care.
- [How to Calculate Saudi Maternity Pay](https://calcnate.com/blog/how-to-calculate-saudi-maternity-leave-pay/): Since the 2025 change, Saudi maternity leave is a flat 12 weeks at full pay.
- [Saudi Maternity Leave: FAQs & Mistakes](https://calcnate.com/blog/saudi-maternity-leave-faq-mistakes/): The maternity misconceptions still circulating in Saudi Arabia after the 2025 change — and the correct, current entitlements.
- [How to Calculate Your Bahrain Leaving Indemnity: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-leaving-indemnity-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Bahrain leaving indemnity, with a full worked-example table across 1 to 10 years of service and the half-month vs full-month
- [Bahrain Leaving Indemnity: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-leaving-indemnity-faq/): The most common questions and mistakes around Bahrain leaving indemnity: resignation myths, band boundaries, wage basis, partial years and who is actually
- [Bahrain Notice Period: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-notice-period-complete-guide/): A complete guide to the Bahrain notice period rules in 2026: the flat 30-day rule under Article 99(a), contractual variations, and the wage basis for payment in
- [How to Calculate Bahrain Notice Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-notice-period-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method for calculating Bahrain notice pay in lieu: the flat 30-day rule, the basic-plus-social-allowance wage basis, and a full worked-example
- [Bahrain Notice Period: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-notice-period-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Bahrain notice periods: the flat 30-day rule, longer contract clauses, the payment-in-lieu wage basis and probation notice.
- [Bahrain Leave Encashment: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-leave-encashment-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Bahrain leave encashment in 2026: the 30-day annual entitlement, the 2.5-days-per-month accrual, and the gross-salary basis under Article
- [How to Calculate Bahrain Leave Encashment: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-leave-encashment-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Bahrain leave encashment: accrue at 2.5 days per month, use the gross-salary daily rate, with a full worked-example table.
- [Bahrain Leave Encashment: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-leave-encashment-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Bahrain leave encashment: gross vs basic salary, accrual at 2.5 days per month, unused leave at end of service and carry-over.
- [Bahrain Probation Period Rules: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-probation-period-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Bahrain probation rules in 2026: the 3-month limit (6 by Ministry decision), the one-probation rule, and the very short Article 21 notice.
- [How to Calculate Bahrain Probation Notice Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-probation-period-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate pay for ending a Bahrain probation early: the Article 21 one-day minimum, the daily-wage basis, and a worked-example table.
- [Bahrain Probation Period: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-probation-period-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Bahrain probation: the 3-month limit, one-probation rule, Article 21 one-day notice, gratuity during probation and contract
- [Bahrain Maternity Leave: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-maternity-leave-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Bahrain maternity leave in 2026: 60 days full pay under Article 32, the 15 unpaid days, the 40-day postnatal rest, and job protection.
- [How to Calculate Bahrain Maternity Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-maternity-leave-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Bahrain maternity pay: 60 days at full wage under Article 32, the daily-wage basis, plus the 15 unpaid days, with a worked
- [Bahrain Maternity Leave: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/bahrain-maternity-leave-faq/): Common questions on Bahrain maternity leave: 60 days full pay, the 15 unpaid days, the 40-day postnatal rest, no cap on occurrences, and childcare-leave
- [How to Calculate Oman Gratuity: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-gratuity-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Oman end-of-service gratuity across the August 2023 split: old-law 15-day years, new-law one-month years, with worked-example
- [Oman Gratuity: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-gratuity-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Oman end-of-service gratuity: basic vs gross salary, the one-year minimum, and how the August 2023 pre/post split really works.
- [Oman Notice Period: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-notice-period-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Oman notice periods under Royal Decree 53/2023: the 30/15-day rule for unlimited contracts, fixed-term rules, and the gross-wage payment in
- [How to Calculate Oman Notice Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-notice-period-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Oman notice pay in lieu: the 30/15-day rule for unlimited contracts and the comprehensive gross-wage basis, with a worked
- [Oman Notice Period: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-notice-period-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Oman notice periods: the 30/15-day rule, fixed-term vs unlimited contracts, the gross-wage payment in lieu, and non-renewal
- [Oman Leave Encashment: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-leave-encashment-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Oman leave encashment under RD 53/2023: 30 days annual leave, basic-wage cash-out in service vs mandatory gross-wage encashment at end of
- [How to Calculate Oman Leave Encashment: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-leave-encashment-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Oman leave encashment: basic wage during service, comprehensive gross wage at end of service, with a full worked-example table.
- [Oman Leave Encashment: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-leave-encashment-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Oman leave encashment: basic vs comprehensive wage, in-service versus end-of-service timing, and the 30-day carry-over cap
- [Oman Probation Period Rules: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-probation-period-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Oman probation under Royal Decree 53/2023: the 3-month (2-month) limit, the one-probation rule, the 7-day notice, and how it counts toward
- [How to Calculate Oman Probation Notice Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-probation-period-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate pay for ending an Oman probation early: the Article 37 seven-day notice, the daily-wage basis, and a full worked-example table.
- [Oman Probation Period: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-probation-period-faq/): Common questions and mistakes on Oman probation under RD 53/2023: the 3/2-month limit, one-probation rule, 7-day notice, and how probation counts toward
- [Oman Maternity Leave: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-maternity-leave-complete-guide/): A complete guide to Oman maternity leave under Royal Decree 53/2023: 98 days full pay under Article 84, the removed caps, no minimum service, and SPF funding.
- [How to Calculate Oman Maternity Pay: A Worked Example](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-maternity-leave-calculation-example/): Step-by-step method to calculate Oman maternity pay: 98 days at full gross wage under Article 84, the daily-wage basis, and a worked table across salaries.
- [Oman Maternity Leave: FAQs, Mistakes & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/oman-maternity-leave-faq/): Common questions on Oman maternity leave under RD 53/2023: 98 days full pay, no cap on occurrences, no minimum service, pre-delivery days and SPF funding.


## India & Philippines employment guides (blog)
- [India Gratuity: Complete 2026 Guide & Eligibility](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-gratuity-complete-guide/): Everything an Indian employee needs to know about gratuity — eligibility, the 15/26 formula, the ₹20 lakh cap and tax, in one place.
- [How to Calculate Gratuity in India (15/26 Worked Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-gratuity-calculation-example/): The exact arithmetic behind India's 15/26 gratuity formula, worked through with a table you can check your own number against.
- [India Gratuity: Common Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-gratuity-faqs-scenarios/): The errors that shrink people's gratuity and the edge cases — fixed-term staff, the 240-day rule, death before five years — answered clearly.
- [India Leave Encashment: Complete 2026 Guide & Formula](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-leave-encashment-complete-guide/): How unused leave is turned into cash in India — the formula, why accrual varies by state, and the ₹25 lakh tax exemption on exit.
- [How to Calculate Leave Encashment in India (Worked Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-leave-encashment-calculation-example/): The exact arithmetic for encashing unused leave in India, including the ÷30-versus-÷26 divisor question, worked through in a table.
- [India Leave Encashment: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-leave-encashment-faqs-scenarios/): Which leave is actually encashable, why the divisor matters, and how the lifetime ₹25 lakh exemption really works.
- [India Maternity Leave: Complete 2026 Guide (26 Weeks)](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-maternity-leave-complete-guide/): India's 26-week maternity entitlement explained in full — eligibility, the third-child reduction, and who actually pays.
- [How to Calculate India Maternity Leave Pay (Worked Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-maternity-leave-calculation-example/): Turning your salary into 26 weeks of fully paid maternity leave — the daily-wage method, worked through in a table.
- [India Maternity Leave: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-maternity-leave-faqs-scenarios/): The conditions people miss — the 80-day rule, the 10-employee threshold, the third-child reduction — and the adoption and miscarriage edge cases.
- [India Notice Period: Why There's No Single Rule (Explained)](https://calcnate.com/blog/india-notice-period-explained/): Why there is no one 'India notice period' number — the contract and state-law patchwork explained honestly, with the exit payments that are calculable.
- [Philippines Separation Pay: Complete 2026 Guide by Cause](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-separation-pay-complete-guide/): What you're owed when a Philippine job ends — every cause, the two rates, resignation and retirement, in one place.
- [How to Compute Separation Pay in the Philippines (Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-separation-pay-calculation-example/): The exact separation-pay arithmetic for the Philippines — rates, rounding and the one-month floor — worked through in a table.
- [Philippines Separation Pay: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-separation-pay-faqs-scenarios/): Why cause is everything — resignation, redundancy vs retrenchment, illegal dismissal and closure-due-to-losses, answered clearly.
- [Philippines Notice Period: Complete Guide (3 Rules)](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-notice-period-complete-guide/): The Philippines' three separate notice regimes — authorized cause, just cause and resignation — explained clearly, with when 30 days applies.
- [Philippines Notice Period: How It Works by Cause (Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-notice-period-calculation-example/): A practical walkthrough of the Philippines' three notice regimes, with the 30-day reference value and what skipping notice actually costs.
- [Philippines Notice Period: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-notice-period-faqs-scenarios/): The procedural traps — notice versus separation pay, on-the-spot dismissals, and the DOLE-notice requirement — explained.
- [Philippines Leave Encashment: SIL Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-leave-encashment-complete-guide/): The Philippines' 5-day Service Incentive Leave — the only leave the law says must be cashed out — explained in full.
- [How to Compute SIL Leave Encashment in the Philippines](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-leave-encashment-calculation-example/): The exact arithmetic for cashing out unused Service Incentive Leave in the Philippines, worked through in a table.
- [Philippines SIL Encashment: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-leave-encashment-faqs-scenarios/): What the 5-day SIL mandate really covers — company vacation, the one-year rule, exemptions and managerial staff — clarified.
- [Philippines Probationary Employment: Complete 2026 Guide](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-probation-complete-guide/): The Philippines' probationary-employment rules in full — the 6-month cap, valid grounds, notice, and when separation pay still applies.
- [Philippines Probation Rules Applied: A Worked Walkthrough](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-probation-calculation-example/): A step-by-step walkthrough of the six-month cap, the valid grounds, and when a probationary employee is still owed separation pay.
- [Philippines Probation: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-probation-faqs-scenarios/): The probation myths that cost people — 'any reason' dismissal, no-rights assumptions, and quietly extending past six months — corrected.
- [Philippines Maternity Leave: Complete 2026 Guide (105 Days)](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-maternity-leave-complete-guide/): The Philippines' 105-days-every-pregnancy maternity entitlement explained in full — solo-parent leave, SSS funding and the salary differential.
- [How to Compute Philippines Maternity Pay (Worked Example)](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-maternity-leave-calculation-example/): Estimating your 105-day (or 120-day) Philippine maternity pay, and how SSS and the employer salary differential divide it.
- [Philippines Maternity Leave: Mistakes, FAQs & Scenarios](https://calcnate.com/blog/philippines-maternity-leave-faqs-scenarios/): The SSS mechanics, the salary differential, solo-parent leave and the father-allocation feature — the parts people miss, clarified.

## API for AI apps
- API: https://api.calcnate.com/api/calc/gratuity?country=ae&basic=6000&years=7 (codes: ae,sa,qa,kw,bh,om,in,ph)
- OpenAPI: https://calcnate.com/openapi.yaml (ChatGPT Actions)
- MCP: https://calcnate.com/mcp.json (Claude & ChatGPT Apps)
- Contact: support@servia.ae
